title: achillea fragrantissima
intro: Achillea fragrantissima, also known as White Yarrow or Fern-Leaf Yarrow, is a perennial flowering plant native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Achillea fragrantissima include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Achillea fragrantissima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various applications in herbal medicine and skincare.
